phases.goal: Preserve buyer criteria and ask network contact for buyer package recipient and proof of funds/closing speed if available
Use DCAD 2026 current appraisal roll to source parcels in target ZIPs with Dallas situs, 8,000+ sf, single-family/vacant/teardown proxy, and value near budget
Check top public-record candidates against City of Dallas parcel layer, FEMA NFHL flood hazard layer, and City zoning layer
Verify water/sewer/electric/gas taps or active service, recorded plat/legal lot status, and valid address. Public CCN/service-area is not enough for final pass.
Skip-trace owners only after parcel proof survives criteria; no fake/guessed phones or emails
Create buyer-facing packet with parcel proof, flood/zoning/utility/plat evidence, target acquisition band, and due-diligence checklist

sources.name: Dallas CAD Data Products
sources.use: appraisal roll, owner, situs ZIP, values, legal descriptions

sources.name: City of Dallas Tax Parcels ArcGIS
sources.use: parcel geometry, city parcel attributes, public parcel URL

sources.name: Dallas County Official Public Records
sources.use: recorded plat/replat confirmation in later verification

sources.name: Texas PUC Water/Sewer CCN GIS
sources.use: service-area/provider context; not final utilities-in-place proof
